system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Light Melee against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

You can throw multiple daggers with immense precision at a single target. You can throw one dagger per Rank of Qi at a single target with the dagger’s throw range. Roll one Attack roll for all the daggers. If the Attack hits, make a single Damage roll. If the Damage roll meets or exceeds the target’s Hardiness, he takes 1 Wound for each dagger thrown. Do not add any Damage from the roll itself. This can only be used with daggers or dagger-like objects (needles and caltrops cannot be used for this Technique). Cathartic: As above, except you can throw two daggers per Rank of Qi, and you may divide the daggers between multiple targets.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: This can only be used with daggers or dagger-like objects (needles and caltrops cannot be used for this Technique).
system.catharticEffect: As above, except you can throw two daggers per Rank of Qi, and you may divide the daggers between multiple targets.
